titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُخَلِّفُ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ مِنَ النَّفَقَةِ مَا يَكُونُ فِي مِثْلِهَا الزَّكَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – The man leaves behind expenses with his wife similar to what would happen to incur the Zakāt

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُخَلِّفُ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ مِنَ النَّفَقَةِ مَا يَكُونُ فِي مِثْلِهَا الزَّكَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – The man leaves behind expenses with his wife similar to what would happen to incur the Zakāt

segments: قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ خَلَّفَ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ نَفَقَةً أَلْفَيْنِ لِسَنَتَيْنِ عَلَيْهَا زَكَاةٌ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ شَاهِداً فَعَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ خَلَّفَ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ نَفَقَةً أَلْفَيْنِ لِسَنَتَيْنِ عَلَيْهَا زَكَاةٌ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ شَاهِداً فَعَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan Al-Maazyasws (7th Imamasws), said, ‘I said to himasws, ‘A man leaves behind expense monies with his wife, two thousand for two years. Would there be Zakāt upon her?’ Heasws said: ‘If he was present, so upon him would be the Zakāt, but if he was absent, so there would be no Zakāt upon it’.
en.hubeali.text: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, (It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan Al-Maazyasws (7th Imamasws), said, ‘I said to himasws, ‘A man leaves behind expense monies with his wife, two thousand for two years. Would there be Zakāt upon her?’ Heasws said: ‘If he was present, so upon him would be the Zakāt, but if he was absent, so there would be no Zakāt upon it’.

segments: 1. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, who passed away, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the two thousand that one has left with his family for two years’ expenses is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he is present, there is Zakat due but if he is not present Zakat is not due on it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, who passed away, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the two thousand that one has left with his family for two years’ expenses is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he is present, there is Zakat due but if he is not present Zakat is not due on it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/79)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/79)

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِيسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْمَاضِي ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُخَلِّفُ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ مِنَ النَّفَقَةِ مَا يَكُونُ فِي مِثْلِهَا الزَّكَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – The man leaves behind expenses with his wife similar to what would happen to incur the Zakāt

segments: رَجُلٍ وَضَعَ لِعِيَالِهِ أَلْفَ دِرْهَمٍ نَفَقَةً فَحَالَ عَلَيْهَا الْحَوْلُ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ مُقِيماً زَكَّاهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً لَمْ يُزَكِّهِ .
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ وَضَعَ لِعِيَالِهِ أَلْفَ دِرْهَمٍ نَفَقَةً فَحَالَ عَلَيْهَا الْحَوْلُ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ مُقِيماً زَكَّاهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً لَمْ يُزَكِّهِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a man who places a thousand Dirhams for his dependents as expense money, and a year passes by upon it. Heasws said: ‘If he was staying, there would be Zakāt, and if he was absent, it would not be subjected to Zakāt’.
en.hubeali.text: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a man who places a thousand Dirhams for his dependents as expense money, and a year passes by upon it. Heasws said: ‘If he was staying, there would be Zakāt, and if he was absent, it would not be subjected to Zakāt’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “He once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who leaves one thousand dirham for the expenses of his family and it remains with them for one complete year is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he stays Zakat is due, but if he is absent, Zakat is not due on it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “He once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who leaves one thousand dirham for the expenses of his family and it remains with them for one complete year is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he stays Zakat is due, but if he is absent, Zakat is not due on it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/80)
gradings.label: حسن كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/80)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُخَلِّفُ عِنْدَ أَهْلِهِ مِنَ النَّفَقَةِ مَا يَكُونُ فِي مِثْلِهَا الزَّكَاةُ
titles.en: Chapter 26 – The man leaves behind expenses with his wife similar to what would happen to incur the Zakāt

segments: قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ يُخَلِّفُ لِأَهْلِهِ ثَلَاثَةَ آلَافِ دِرْهَمٍ نَفَقَةَ سَنَتَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ شَاهِداً فَعَلَيْهَا زَكَاةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً فَلَيْسَ فِيهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ يُخَلِّفُ لِأَهْلِهِ ثَلَاثَةَ آلَافِ دِرْهَمٍ نَفَقَةَ سَنَتَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ زَكَاةٌ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ شَاهِداً فَعَلَيْهَا زَكَاةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَائِباً فَلَيْسَ فِيهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, from Yunus, from Sama’at, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I said to himasws, ‘The man leaves behind three thousand Dirhams as expense monies (with his wife) for two years. Would there be Zakāt upon it?’ Heasws said: ‘If he was present, so upon her would be the Zakāt, but if he was absent, so there is nothing with regards to it’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, from Yunus, from Sama’at, from Abu Baseer, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I said to himasws, ‘The man leaves behind three thousand Dirhams as expense monies (with his wife) for two years. Would there be Zakāt upon it?’ Heasws said: ‘If he was present, so upon her would be the Zakāt, but if he was absent, so there is nothing with regards to it’.

segments: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ’Isma‘il ibn Marrar from Yunus from Sama‘ah from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who leaves with his family three thousand dirham for the expenses of two years is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he is present, Zakat is due, but if he is absent, Zakat is not due.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ’Isma‘il ibn Marrar from Yunus from Sama‘ah from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who leaves with his family three thousand dirham for the expenses of two years is there Zakat on it? He (the Imam) said, ‘If he is present, Zakat is due, but if he is absent, Zakat is not due.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/80)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/80)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ مَرَّارٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
